notableEvents.label: Daniel Schneemann GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Daniel Schneemann grounds into a double play, second baseman Chase Meidroth to shortstop Colson Montgomery to first baseman Jacob Gonzalez. Kahlil Watson out at 2nd. Daniel Schneemann out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Daniel Schneemann rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Daniel Schneemann grounds into a double play, second baseman Chase Meidroth to shortstop Colson Montgomery to first baseman Jacob Gonzalez. Kahlil Watson out at 2nd. Daniel Schneemann out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Kahlil Watson singles on a line drive to left fielder Sam Antonacci. Brayan Rocchio scores. Petey Halpin scores. Kyle Manzardo to 3rd. Kahlil Watson to 2nd. Throwing error by left fielder Sam Antonacci.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: David Fry reaches on a fielder's choice. Brayan Rocchio to 2nd. Brayan Rocchio advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by shortstop Colson Montgomery.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Kahlil Watson singles on a line drive to left fielder Sam Antonacci. Brayan Rocchio scores. Petey Halpin scores. Kyle Manzardo to 3rd. Kahlil Watson to 2nd. Throwing error by left fielder Sam Antonacci.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Kahlil Watson singles on a line drive to left fielder Sam Antonacci. Brayan Rocchio scores. Petey Halpin scores. Kyle Manzardo to 3rd. Kahlil Watson to 2nd. Throwing error by left fielder Sam Antonacci.

notableEvents.label: Randal Grichuk pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Randal Grichuk lines out sharply to left fielder Steven Kwan.

notableEvents.label: Randal Grichuk pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Randal Grichuk homers (9) on a fly ball to left center field.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
